Video.summary: Bob paints an autumn scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Indian Summer

Video.summary: Bob paints a quiet brook in a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Serenity

Video.summary: Bob uses blue tones to paint a wintry scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cabin at Trail's End

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wilderness Cabin

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain and small waterfall.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Royal Majesty

Video.summary: Bob paints a serene seascape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: By the Sea

Video.summary: Bob paints the northern lights.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Northern Lights

Video.summary: Bob paints a pastel mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Rhapsody

Video.summary: Bob paints a winter landscape.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Evergreens

Video.summary: Snow-covered peaks loom over a lush meadow.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Road

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunrise.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Fisherman's Paradise

Video.summary: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Foot of the Mountain

Video.summary: A path of cacti and rocks leads right up to a bold sun setting in a dramatic red sky.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cactus at Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a storm's onset.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Just Before the Storm

Video.summary: Bob paints a desert site within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Desert Glow

Video.summary: Bob paints a rocky mountain.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lone Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints flowering trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Trace of Spring

Video.summary: Guest painter Steve Ross uses a lot of color in a depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Range

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow-tipped valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: First Snow

Video.summary: Bob paints a southern scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cypress Swamp

Video.summary: Bob paints distant mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Downstream View

Video.summary: Bob paints the desert in spring.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Desert Hues

Video.summary: Bob paints a wilderness home.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Delightful Meadow Home

Video.summary: Bob paints a fence beside a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: The Property Line

Video.summary: Bob paints a lone cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: An Arctic Winter Day

Video.summary: Bob demonstrates his wet-on-wet technique.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Red Sunset

Video.summary: Bob highlights a snowy scene with blue.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lonely Retreat

Video.summary: Bob paints a foggy river.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: In the Stillness of Morning

Video.summary: Bob paints ocean waves rolling ashore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Surf's Up

Video.summary: Bob paints a hidden lake.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lake in the Valley

Video.summary: Bob paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Majestic Pine

Video.summary: Mountains overlook a peaceful autumn scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Autumn Woods

Video.summary: Painting a golden sunset on a black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Sunset

Video.summary: Bob Ross' son Steve demonstrates painting within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints detailed trees in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Solitude

Video.summary: Painting the sun as it sets over a deserted beach.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ocean Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a warm sun high in the sky to offset the cold mountainscape below.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Frost

Video.summary: Bob creates an effect using masking tape on the canvas as he paints the sky and mountains as a backdrop for a meadow, trees and a cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Triple View

Video.summary: Bob paints a woodland scene complete with a small footbridge running across a creek.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Secluded Bridge

Video.summary: Bob Ross paints a forest landscape, featuring a stream, rock formations and trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Twin Falls

Video.summary: Creating a seascape using a half black, half white canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ocean Breeze
